name: Knock Knock…Kaun Hai?
overview: Tanya makes a death wish on a dare app sets off a dangerous game of blackmail and violence. As her loved ones become targets, she must race against time to unmask the 'Knock Knock' Killer before it's too late.

trailers.title: Knock Knock Kaun Hai - Official Trailer | Aadhya Anand, Arjun Deswal, Kush Jotwani |Amazon MX Player
